top.name: The Grand Design
top.rules_text: For the rest of the fight: whenever you prepare a glyph it is also prepared on all tiles within 1, and all your glyphs trigger twice.

bottom.name: Absolute Territory
bottom.rules_text: Prepare your glyph effects on every tile within 3 of you. Enemies in this zone deal half damage, take 2 per tile moved, and cannot teleport. Lasts 2 turns.

changes.value: Rest of fight: glyphs you prepare also prepare on all tiles within 1, cost 1 less, and trigger twice.
Prepare your effects within 3. Enemies deal half, take 3 per tile moved, cannot teleport. Lasts 2 turns.

upgrades.description: The Greater Design: each prepare also banks Weave.

changes.value: Rest of fight: glyphs spread to radius 1, cost 1 less, trigger twice, and bank 1 Weave on prepare.

upgrades.description: Absolute Territory (Wide): the zone lasts 3 turns.

changes.value: Prepare your effects within 3. Enemies deal half, take 3 per tile moved, cannot teleport. Lasts 3 turns.

upgrades.description: The Master Design: glyphs spread to radius 2.

changes.value: Rest of fight: glyphs spread to radius 2, cost 1 less, trigger twice, bank 1 Weave on prepare.

upgrades.description: Absolute Territory (Total): enemies inside are also Named.

changes.value: Prepare your effects within 3. Enemies are Named, take 3 per tile moved, cannot teleport. Lasts 3 turns.

upgrades.description: The Seventh Layer: glyphs trigger three times and spread to radius 2.

changes.value: Rest of fight: glyphs spread to radius 2, cost 1 less, trigger THREE times, and bank 1 Weave on prepare.

upgrades.description: The Unwritten Law: a permanent, total domain.

changes.value: Prepare your effects permanently within 4. Enemies are Named, take 4 per tile moved, cannot teleport.
